title: CTM Faithful
description: Adds connected textures but with Faithful's textures
body:
![banner](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/banner_ctmf.png)

[![continuity](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/requires_continuity.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
or
[![optifine](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/optifine_vector.svg)](https://optifine.net/home)

## Adds connected textures to the game but with Faithful textures (works with Optifine and Continuity)

> This pack adds connected textures to blocks like gold block, sea lanterns (see gallery), but with Faithful 64x textures.
>
> The pack is based on their textures so here is the link to comply with their license : <https://faithfulpack.net>

<details>
<summary>✅ Show available blocks</summary>

> Copper blocks are present in both normal and waxed states

![img_ctm](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctmf/batch_ctmf.png)

</details>

## Here are some visual examples of what this pack does

> Left is what a 3x3 area of blocks looks like in vanilla, and right is with the texture pack

![img_ctm_off](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctmf/iso_diamond_off_f.png)
![img_ctm_on](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctmf/iso_diamond_on_f.png)

![img_ctm2_off](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctmf/iso_glass_off_f.png)
![img_ctm2_on](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctmf/iso_glass_on_f.png)

If you want to be able to select which blocks in the pack have connected textures, you might want to check out this project: https://modrinth.com/mod/ctm-selector

***

> If you find any issue with this pack, please open an issue here: https://todo.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resourcepacks-And-Datapacks so I can fix it
>
> If you have a suggestion, go on the discord and create a post in 🗽-suggestions-forum
>
> [![discord_badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/750243612473819188?color=7289da&label=DISCORD&logo=discord&logoColor=7289da&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/PcYPpqzhKS)
